Off Calendar Mar-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE SAN FRANCISCO CITY AND COUNTY EMPLOYEES'RETIREMENT SYSTEM Petition for Peremptory Writ of Mandate to be issued against respondent American Arbitration Association, and real party in interest John S. Propst, pursuant to CCP section 1094.5.
Appearances:
Rebecca Yee Liu, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3900 appearing for Petitioner and Moving party; Michael S. Hebel Attorney at Law, (415) 861-0211 appearing for Respondent and opposing party.

Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Petition denied. (For the Court's complete ruling see Minutes in Word document in IJS. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW). Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer CSR # 5208
